methodology.description: Moat-at-Trough screen: score candidates on (1) moat durability, (2) cyclical trough signals, (3) demand inflection from active macro themes. FULL_SIGNAL requires all three.
methodology.thematic_detection: Active themes derived from market-orientation-map.json + always-on core themes (AI_INFRASTRUCTURE, AI_INFERENCE_DEMAND, NUCLEAR_POWER, SEMICONDUCTOR_CAPEX)

coverage_gaps.description: Data center build-out, AI training and inference compute infrastructure
coverage_gaps.urgency: MEDIUM — active theme with partial coverage

coverage_gaps.description: AI inference at scale — edge, cloud, real-time model serving
coverage_gaps.urgency: MEDIUM — active theme with partial coverage

coverage_gaps.description: Nuclear energy renaissance driven by AI data center baseload demand
coverage_gaps.urgency: MEDIUM — active theme with partial coverage

coverage_gaps.description: Semiconductor fab investment cycle — TSMC Arizona, Intel foundry, Samsung Texas
coverage_gaps.urgency: MEDIUM — active theme with partial coverage

full_signal_candidates.name: Centrus Energy
full_signal_candidates.moat_summary: Only US-licensed enriched uranium producer. Post-Russia sanctions, critical for US energy independence. HALEU (high-assay low-enriched uranium) required for next-gen SMR reactors — Centrus is the only US source.
full_signal_candidates.demand_inflection_signal: SMR reactors require HALEU that only Centrus makes. Post-Russia sanctions creates structural supply gap.
full_signal_candidates.promotion_criteria: nearTrough=true AND SMR timeline + HALEU contract awards
signals_detected: Revenue RECOVERY: Revenue growing 4.9% YoY — recovery confirmed

full_signal_candidates.name: BWX Technologies
full_signal_candidates.moat_summary: Only US manufacturer of naval nuclear reactor components + commercial nuclear fuel. No substitutes for US Navy nuclear submarine reactors. Growing commercial nuclear business as SMRs develop.
full_signal_candidates.demand_inflection_signal: SMR orders materializing. US Navy reactor demand baseline. Commercial nuclear fuel contract pipeline building.
full_signal_candidates.promotion_criteria: nearTrough=true AND SMR order wins announced
signals_detected: Revenue RECOVERY: Revenue growing 26.1% YoY — recovery confirmed

full_signal_candidates.name: Entegris
full_signal_candidates.moat_summary: Specialty chemicals, gases, and filtration for leading-edge semiconductor fabs. Consumable — recurring revenue every time a wafer is processed. Critical but invisible in the supply chain.
full_signal_candidates.demand_inflection_signal: Wafer starts recovering at TSMC/Samsung. Consumable spend recovers with fab utilization.
full_signal_candidates.promotion_criteria: nearTrough=true AND fab utilization rates recovering
signals_detected: Revenue RECOVERY: Revenue growing 5% YoY — recovery confirmed

partial_signal_candidates.name: Micron Technology
partial_signal_candidates.moat_summary: Top-3 global HBM/DRAM manufacturer. Only 3 companies can make HBM (Micron, SK Hynix, Samsung) — spec-qualified in NVIDIA GPU supply chain. 40 years of process IP.
partial_signal_candidates.demand_inflection_signal: HBM allocation sold out per earnings calls. AI GPU density increasing memory per chip.
partial_signal_candidates.promotion_criteria: nearTrough=true AND (themeAdjacency active) AND (insider buying OR revenue QoQ inflecting)
signals_detected: Open-market insider BUYING: Liu Teyin M $1272K @ $336.63 (180d)
Revenue RECOVERY: Revenue growing 123.7% YoY — recovery confirmed

partial_signal_candidates.name: HubSpot
partial_signal_candidates.moat_summary: Dominant SMB CRM and marketing platform. AI is embedding deeply into content generation, lead scoring, and sales automation. Salesforce threat is real but SMB inertia is high.
partial_signal_candidates.demand_inflection_signal: AI Breeze features driving new seat expansion. SMB AI adoption is accelerating via HubSpot.
partial_signal_candidates.promotion_criteria: nearTrough=true AND seat expansion + AI feature adoption
signals_detected: Revenue RECOVERY: Revenue growing 23.4% YoY — recovery confirmed

partial_signal_candidates.name: Onto Innovation
partial_signal_candidates.moat_summary: Process control and metrology for advanced packaging (CoWoS, HBM integration). CoWoS is TSMC's packaging technology for NVIDIA GPUs — every HBM stack requires ONTO's inspection systems.
partial_signal_candidates.demand_inflection_signal: Advanced packaging capex growing rapidly — TSMC expanding CoWoS capacity by 3x for AI GPU demand.
partial_signal_candidates.promotion_criteria: nearTrough=true AND advanced packaging capex signals

partial_signal_candidates.name: Teradyne
partial_signal_candidates.moat_summary: Dominant semiconductor test equipment — every chip (NVDA, AVGO, AMD) is tested on Teradyne equipment before shipping. Near-monopoly in complex SoC testing. Non-discretionary spend.
partial_signal_candidates.demand_inflection_signal: Advanced chip complexity increases test time per die. AI chip shipment volumes multiplying = test capacity expansion required.
partial_signal_candidates.promotion_criteria: nearTrough=true AND unit shipment volumes of AI chips growing

partial_signal_candidates.name: Western Digital (SanDisk NAND)
partial_signal_candidates.moat_summary: Top-3 global NAND flash manufacturer. Spinning out SanDisk brand as standalone entity. AI model storage, data lake expansion, and edge inference all require NAND at scale.
partial_signal_candidates.demand_inflection_signal: NAND pricing recovering. Enterprise SSD demand accelerating from AI workload data lakes.
partial_signal_candidates.promotion_criteria: nearTrough=true AND NAND pricing inflection confirmed in earnings

partial_signal_candidates.name: Arista Networks
partial_signal_candidates.moat_summary: Dominant AI data center networking — 400GbE/800GbE ethernet fabric for GPU clusters. NVIDIA switched from InfiniBand to ethernet for some workloads, expanding Arista's TAM. >98% gross retention.
partial_signal_candidates.demand_inflection_signal: AI cluster networking orders from hyperscalers (MSFT, META, GOOGL, AMZN) accelerating.
partial_signal_candidates.promotion_criteria: nearTrough=true AND hyperscaler capex guidance up
signals_detected: Moat: Level-2 supply chain (Data Center Networking)

partial_signal_candidates.name: GitLab
partial_signal_candidates.moat_summary: End-to-end DevSecOps platform — source code, CI/CD, security scanning, and now AI coding assistance in one tool. Enterprises that consolidate on GitLab stay (5+ year contracts). AI Duo coding assistant embeds it deeper.
partial_signal_candidates.demand_inflection_signal: AI coding assistants require centralized code context — GitLab is where enterprise code lives. Duo AI drives upsell.
partial_signal_candidates.promotion_criteria: nearTrough=true AND AI Duo ARR accelerating
gaps: Revenue still declining: YoY decline worsening: 26.8% → 23.1%

partial_signal_candidates.name: Marvell Technology
partial_signal_candidates.moat_summary: Custom ASIC design for hyperscaler AI accelerators (Google TPU, Amazon Trainium). Also dominant in data center optical connectivity ICs. Two high-growth vectors in same company.
partial_signal_candidates.demand_inflection_signal: Custom AI ASIC TAM expanding as hyperscalers want to reduce NVIDIA dependency. Optical interconnect demand exploding with 400G/800G rollout.
partial_signal_candidates.promotion_criteria: nearTrough=true AND hyperscaler custom ASIC spend signals
signals_detected: Moat: Level-2 supply chain (Custom AI Silicon + Networking)
gaps: Revenue still declining: YoY decline worsening: 51.3% → 27.6%

partial_signal_candidates.name: Cloudflare
partial_signal_candidates.moat_summary: Global edge network (300+ cities) — AI inference at the edge runs on Cloudflare Workers. Unique position: security + networking + AI inference on one network. No competitor has this scale.
partial_signal_candidates.demand_inflection_signal: AI inference at the edge is the next wave after centralized training. Workers AI is early but positioned correctly.
partial_signal_candidates.promotion_criteria: nearTrough=true AND Workers AI adoption signals
signals_detected: Moat: Level-2 supply chain (Edge Networking + Security)
Revenue RECOVERY: Revenue growing 33.5% YoY — recovery confirmed

partial_signal_candidates.name: Emerson Electric
partial_signal_candidates.moat_summary: Industrial automation and process control — the software and hardware that runs factories, power plants, and refineries. High switching costs. AI is now embedded in process control systems.
partial_signal_candidates.demand_inflection_signal: Reshoring of manufacturing + grid modernization drives industrial automation spend.
partial_signal_candidates.promotion_criteria: nearTrough=true AND industrial orders recovering + reshoring signals
gaps: Revenue still declining: YoY decline worsening: 4.1% → 3.5%

partial_signal_candidates.name: KLA Corporation
partial_signal_candidates.moat_summary: Dominant in process control and yield management equipment — the quality control layer every fab needs. Near-monopoly in specific inspection categories. Cannot cut capex without degrading yield.
partial_signal_candidates.demand_inflection_signal: WFE (wafer fab equipment) spend recovering. Leading-edge node ramp at TSMC/Samsung requires process control at every layer.
partial_signal_candidates.promotion_criteria: nearTrough=true AND WFE spend cycle inflecting upward

partial_signal_candidates.name: Lam Research
partial_signal_candidates.moat_summary: Leading etch and deposition equipment — critical for 3D NAND, leading-edge logic, and advanced packaging. Strong position in memory fab tooling which benefits directly from HBM capex.
partial_signal_candidates.demand_inflection_signal: HBM requires more etch/dep steps per die. Memory capex recovery creates direct demand pull.
partial_signal_candidates.promotion_criteria: nearTrough=true AND memory capex recovery signals in AMAT/ASML earnings
gaps: Revenue still declining: YoY decline worsening: 24.9% → 24.5%

partial_signal_candidates.name: Snowflake
partial_signal_candidates.moat_summary: Data cloud platform — where enterprises store the data that feeds AI models. Strong network effects as data sharing within the ecosystem creates switching costs. New CEO (Sridhar Ramaswamy) with AI product push.
partial_signal_candidates.demand_inflection_signal: AI Cortex (Snowflake's AI layer) driving consumption growth re-acceleration. Enterprises need centralized data to feed LLMs.
partial_signal_candidates.promotion_criteria: nearTrough=true AND product revenue re-acceleration signals

partial_signal_candidates.name: MongoDB
partial_signal_candidates.moat_summary: Dominant document database — the database of choice for AI-native applications. As developers build AI applications, they reach for MongoDB first. Extreme developer mindshare.
partial_signal_candidates.demand_inflection_signal: AI application development boom drives new workload creation on MongoDB. Atlas consumption growing.

moat_only.name: Hubbell
moat_only.moat_summary: Electrical components and grid infrastructure products — transformers, switchgear, wiring devices. Every data center and utility substation uses Hubbell products. Non-discretionary infrastructure.
moat_only.demand_inflection_signal: Grid modernization is a multi-decade program. Every new data center requires Hubbell electrical products.
moat_only.promotion_criteria: nearTrough=true AND grid/data center construction rates
signals_detected: Revenue RECOVERY: Revenue growing 11.1% YoY — recovery confirmed

moat_only.name: Rockwell Automation
moat_only.moat_summary: Dominant US industrial automation platform — PLCs, drives, software. Semiconductor fabs, EV battery plants, and data center facilities all run on Rockwell. Deep switching costs.
moat_only.demand_inflection_signal: Semiconductor fab construction (TSMC Arizona, Intel Ohio) requires massive Rockwell automation systems.
moat_only.promotion_criteria: nearTrough=true AND semiconductor fab construction contracts

moat_only.name: Aehr Test Systems
moat_only.moat_summary: Near-monopoly in wafer-level burn-in testing for silicon carbide (SiC) chips used in EV powertrains and grid inverters. SiC requires extended burn-in that only Aehr can perform at wafer scale.
moat_only.demand_inflection_signal: EV adoption recovery + grid modernization drives SiC chip demand. Aehr is the only wafer-level burn-in solution.
moat_only.promotion_criteria: nearTrough=true AND SiC chip orders recovering + EV demand signals
gaps: Revenue still declining: YoY decline worsening: -21.5% → -30.6%

all_scored.name: Intuitive Surgical
all_scored.moat_summary: Dominant robotic surgery platform — da Vinci installed in 8,000+ hospitals globally. Razor/blade model: sell the robot, earn on instruments and services forever. Surgeons train on it and never switch.
all_scored.demand_inflection_signal: Procedure volumes recovering post-COVID backlog. Ion lung biopsy system adds new TAM.
all_scored.promotion_criteria: nearTrough=true AND procedure volume recovery
signals_detected: Revenue RECOVERY: Revenue growing 23% YoY — recovery confirmed

all_scored.demand_inflection_signal: Fiber capacity between data centers must scale with GPU compute growth. Pre-consensus opportunity.
